---
name: Audit Challenge
about: Challenge a specific finding, score, or conclusion in the audit
title: "[CHALLENGE] "
labels: audit-challenge
assignees: ''
---

## Claim Being Challenged

**File:** (e.g., `audit/phase2_uniqueness/84_uniqueness_final_verdict.md`)
**Claim ID or section:** (e.g., C-004521, Section 3.2, or "Overall score 65/100")

## The Challenge

_State precisely what you believe is wrong. One sentence._

## Your Argument

_Provide a formal or structural argument. Assertions without reasoning will be closed._

## Evidence

_What data, counterexample, or logical derivation supports your challenge?_

## What You Expect Should Change

- [ ] A score should be adjusted
- [ ] A verdict should change
- [ ] A counterexample should be added or removed
- [ ] A claim ID should be reclassified
- [ ] Other: ___

## Competing System (if applicable)

If you are proposing a new competing system that passes the CFS test suite, fill in:

| Axiom | Statement |
|-------|-----------|
| A1 | |
| A2 | |
| ... | |

## Standards Applied

Confirm: I am applying the same standards to both this system and the Theory of Liberty.
- [ ] Yes
